name: NIST AI RMF: MAP — System Categorized
description: The AI system is categorized by its capabilities, intended use, and risk level.
rationale: NIST AI RMF MAP 2: the AI system is categorized; its capabilities, targeted usage, goals and expected benefits/costs are understood.

examples.fails: the required risk-management step is absent

source: NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0), NIST AI 100-1, 26 Jan 2023 — voluntary framework organised around GOVERN, MAP, MEASURE, MANAGE. https://www.nist.gov/itl/ai-risk-management-framework
